.diagram{position:relative;height:250px;margin-top:1.2rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .sec,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .fan{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f9fcff,#dde9f6);border:3px solid #466989;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,.32)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .fan{left:3%;width:11%;border-radius:22px}
```{=html}
    #wind-tunnel-74-premium .fan::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:10px;border-radius:50%;background:repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg,#dceef8 0 20deg,#7fc8a9 20deg 40deg)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .diff{left:14%;width:16%;clip-path:polygon(0 34%,100% 12%,100% 88%,0 66%)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .test{left:30%;width:36%;border-radius:16px;border-style:dashed;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfffc,#effcf3)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .cont{left:66%;width:16%;clip-path:polygon(0 12%,100% 34%,100% 66%,0 88%)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .out{left:82%;width:12%;border-radius:20px}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .flow-main{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;border-radius:inherit}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .main-stream{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 18% 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.82) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 0 50%/34px 100% repeat-x,linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(111,207,151,.08),rgba(39,174,96,.72),rgba(111,207,151,.08));animation:mf174left 1.15s linear infinite;opacity:.94;transition:transform .35s ease,opacity .35s ease}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .holes{position:absolute;left:30%;width:36%;top:24%;height:52%;pointer-events:none}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .hole{position:absolute;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#76c893;border:1px solid rgba(34,101,61,.32)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .suction{position:absolute;width:12px;height:38px;border-radius:999px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%,rgba(255,255,255,.86) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 50% 0/100% 26px repeat-y,linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(111,207,151,.06),rgba(39,174,96,.58),rgba(111,207,151,.06));animation:mf174up 1s linear infinite;transform-origin:center bottom;opacity:.9;transition:transform .35s ease,opacity .35s ease}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s1,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s2,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s3,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s4,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s5,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s6{top:12%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s7,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s8,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s9,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s10,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s11,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .s12{bottom:12%;animation-name:mf174down;transform-origin:center top}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .bl{position:absolute;left:30%;width:36%;top:28%;height:44%;pointer-events:none;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(39,174,96,.16),transparent 20%,transparent 80%,rgba(39,174,96,.16));border-radius:14px;opacity:.55;transition:opacity .35s ease}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .labels span{position:absolute;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;color:#385873;background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.12);border-radius:999px;padding:.25rem .5rem;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(34,66,98,.08)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .l0{left:6%;top:8%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .l1{left:37%;top:8%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .l2{left:69%;top:8%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .lf{left:16%;bottom:8%}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metrics,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .formula{padding:1rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metrics h4,#wind-tunnel-74-premium .formula h4{margin:0 0 .9rem;font-size:.98rem;color:#1a4266}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .gridm{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.85rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metric{padding:.85rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fafdff,#eef7ff);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.1)}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metric .k{display:block;font-size:.77rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#67829c;margin-bottom:.35rem}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metric .v{font-size:1.06rem;font-weight:800;color:#10395e;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .metric .s{margin-top:.25rem;font-size:.78rem;color:#64819b}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .box{padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.76);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.12);line-height:1.65;color:#355771}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .eq{font-family:"Cambria Math","STIX Two Math",serif;font-size:1.02rem;color:#143d62}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .small{font-size:.84rem;color:#64819b;margin-top:.55rem}@keyframes mf174left{from{background-position:0 50%,0 0}to{background-position:-34px 50%,0 0}}@keyframes mf174up{from{background-position:50% 0,0 0}to{background-position:50% -26px,0 0}}@keyframes mf174down{from{background-position:50% 0,0 0}to{background-position:50% 26px,0 0}}@media (max-width:980px){#wind-tunnel-74-premium .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr}#wind-tunnel-74-premium .gridm{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}@media (max-width:640px){#wind-tunnel-74-premium .gridm{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  </style>
  <div class="hero">
    <h3>Widget 74: Aerotunel s perforiranom stjenkom</h3>
    <p>U ispitnoj sekciji dio struje izlazi kroz perforiranu stjenku. Što je veći odsis kroz rupice, to je manji protok koji ostaje u glavnom kanalu, pa opada brzina na presjeku 2 i mijenja se potrebna brzina u zoni ventilatora.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="card controls">
      <div class="note"><strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Svaka perforacija odnosi mali dio glavnog toka. Kad se ti mali odsisni tokovi zbroje preko cijele sekcije, brzina u glavnom kanalu mora pasti jer nakon perforacija ostaje manji volumenski protok.</div>
      <h4>Parametri odsisa</h4>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-v1"><span>Ulazna brzina v1</span><span id="wt74-v1-val">46.0 m/s</span></label><input id="wt74-v1" type="range" min="20" max="60" step="1" value="46"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-vp"><span>Brzina u provrtu v_p</span><span id="wt74-vp-val">10.0 m/s</span></label><input id="wt74-vp" type="range" min="5" max="20" step="0.5" value="10"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-np"><span>Broj provrta n_p</span><span id="wt74-np-val">800 1/m^2</span></label><input id="wt74-np" type="range" min="400" max="1200" step="20" value="800"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-dp"><span>Promjer provrta d_p</span><span id="wt74-dp-val">7.0 mm</span></label><input id="wt74-dp" type="range" min="3" max="12" step="0.1" value="7"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-l"><span>Duljina sekcije L</span><span id="wt74-l-val">4.0 m</span></label><input id="wt74-l" type="range" min="2" max="6" step="0.1" value="4"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-d1"><span>Promjer D1 = D2</span><span id="wt74-d1-val">0.90 m</span></label><input id="wt74-d1" type="range" min="0.6" max="1.2" step="0.01" value="0.9"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="wt74-df"><span>Promjer ventilatora D_f</span><span id="wt74-df-val">2.40 m</span></label><input id="wt74-df" type="range" min="1.6" max="3.2" step="0.01" value="2.4"></div>
      <div class="note">Glavni tok putuje kroz tunel, a kroz perforacije se odvaja dio volumena. Ostatak protoka određuje brzinu u sekciji 2, dok kontinuitet između presjeka 2 i ventilatora daje brzinu <span class="eq">v_f</span>.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="viz">
      <div class="card stage">
        <div class="grid"></div>
        <div class="labels"><span class="l0">v1</span><span class="l1">ispitna sekcija</span><span class="l2">v2</span><span class="lf">v_f</span></div>
        <div class="diagram">
          <div class="fan" id="wt74-fan"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main1" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div class="sec diff" id="wt74-diff"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main2" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div class="sec test" id="wt74-test"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main3" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div class="sec cont" id="wt74-cont"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main4" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div class="sec out" id="wt74-out"><div class="flow-main"><div id="wt74-main5" class="main-stream"></div></div></div>
          <div id="wt74-bl" class="bl"></div>
          <div class="holes" id="wt74-holes">
            <div class="hole" style="left:8%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:24%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:40%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:56%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:72%;top:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:88%;top:18%"></div>
            <div class="hole" style="left:8%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:24%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:40%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:56%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:72%;bottom:18%"></div><div class="hole" style="left:88%;bottom:18%"></div>
            <div class="suction s1" style="left:7%"></div><div class="suction s2" style="left:23%"></div><div class="suction s3" style="left:39%"></div><div class="suction s4" style="left:55%"></div><div class="suction s5" style="left:71%"></div><div class="suction s6" style="left:87%"></div>
            <div class="suction s7" style="left:7%"></div><div class="suction s8" style="left:23%"></div><div class="suction s9" style="left:39%"></div><div class="suction s10" style="left:55%"></div><div class="suction s11" style="left:71%"></div><div class="suction s12" style="left:87%"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card metrics">
        <h4>Rezultati u stvarnom vremenu</h4>
        <div class="gridm">
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">N_p</span><span id="wt74-Np" class="v">9048</span><div class="s">Ukupni broj provrta</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A_suction</span><span id="wt74-As" class="v">0.3482 m^2</span><div class="s">Ukupna perforirana površina</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">V̇_suction</span><span id="wt74-Vs" class="v">3.482 m^3/s</span><div class="s">Odsisani protok</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">v2</span><span id="wt74-v2" class="v">40.53 m/s</span><div class="s">Brzina nakon odsisa</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">v_f</span><span id="wt74-vf" class="v">5.70 m/s</span><div class="s">Brzina kod ventilatora</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card formula">
        <h4>Bilanca kroz tunel</h4>
        <div class="box">
          <div class="eq">V̇_suction = n_p · (π d_p^2 / 4) · (π D_1 L) · v_p</div>
          <div id="wt74-eq1" style="margin-top:.55rem">V̇_suction = 3.482 m^3/s</div>
          <div id="wt74-eq2" style="margin-top:.55rem">v_2 = (V̇_1 - V̇_suction) / A_1 = 40.53 m/s</div>
          <div id="wt74-eq3" style="margin-top:.55rem">v_f = (D_1^2 / D_f^2) · v_2 = 5.70 m/s</div>
          <div class="small">Kako odsis raste, sve je tanji granični sloj uz perforiranu stijenu i manji je protok koji ostaje u glavnoj struji.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('wind-tunnel-74-premium');
  if (!root) return;
  const sliders = { v1: root.querySelector('#wt74-v1'), vp: root.querySelector('#wt74-vp'), np: root.querySelector('#wt74-np'), dp: root.querySelector('#wt74-dp'), l: root.querySelector('#wt74-l'), d1: root.querySelector('#wt74-d1'), df: root.querySelector('#wt74-df') };
  const labels = { v1: root.querySelector('#wt74-v1-val'), vp: root.querySelector('#wt74-vp-val'), np: root.querySelector('#wt74-np-val'), dp: root.querySelector('#wt74-dp-val'), l: root.querySelector('#wt74-l-val'), d1: root.querySelector('#wt74-d1-val'), df: root.querySelector('#wt74-df-val') };
  const el = {
    main: [root.querySelector('#wt74-main1'), root.querySelector('#wt74-main2'), root.querySelector('#wt74-main3'), root.querySelector('#wt74-main4'), root.querySelector('#wt74-main5')],
    suctions: Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.suction')), bl: root.querySelector('#wt74-bl'),
    Np: root.querySelector('#wt74-Np'), As: root.querySelector('#wt74-As'), Vs: root.querySelector('#wt74-Vs'), v2: root.querySelector('#wt74-v2'), vf: root.querySelector('#wt74-vf'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#wt74-eq1'), eq2: root.querySelector('#wt74-eq2'), eq3: root.querySelector('#wt74-eq3')
  };
  function fmt(v,d){return Number(v).toFixed(d);}
  function area(d){return Math.PI*d*d/4;}
  function strength(node,q,maxq,min){const r=maxq>0?q/maxq:0;const s=Math.max(min,Math.min(1,r));node.style.transform='scale('+s+')';node.style.opacity=String(.22+s*.76);node.style.animationDuration=(Math.max(.35,1.7-s*1.1)).toFixed(2)+'s';}
  function update() {
    const v1=parseFloat(sliders.v1.value),vp=parseFloat(sliders.vp.value),np=parseFloat(sliders.np.value),dp=parseFloat(sliders.dp.value)/1000,L=parseFloat(sliders.l.value),D1=parseFloat(sliders.d1.value),Df=parseFloat(sliders.df.value),D0=2.6;
    labels.v1.textContent=fmt(v1,1)+' m/s'; labels.vp.textContent=fmt(vp,1)+' m/s'; labels.np.textContent=fmt(np,0)+' 1/m^2'; labels.dp.textContent=fmt(dp*1000,1)+' mm'; labels.l.textContent=fmt(L,1)+' m'; labels.d1.textContent=fmt(D1,2)+' m'; labels.df.textContent=fmt(Df,2)+' m';
    const A1=area(D1),Ap=area(dp),wallArea=Math.PI*D1*L,Np=np*wallArea,Asuction=Np*Ap,Vs=Asuction*vp,V1=A1*v1,V2=Math.max(0,V1-Vs),v2=V2/A1,vf=(D1*D1/(Df*Df))*v2,v0=(D1*D1/(D0*D0))*v1;
    el.Np.textContent=Math.round(Np).toString(); el.As.textContent=fmt(Asuction,4)+' m^2'; el.Vs.textContent=fmt(Vs,3)+' m^3/s'; el.v2.textContent=fmt(v2,2)+' m/s'; el.vf.textContent=fmt(vf,2)+' m/s';
    el.eq1.textContent='V̇_suction = '+fmt(np,0)+'·(π·'+fmt(dp,4)+'^2/4)·(π·'+fmt(D1,2)+'·'+fmt(L,1)+')·'+fmt(vp,1)+' = '+fmt(Vs,3)+' m^3/s';
    el.eq2.textContent='v_2 = ('+fmt(V1,3)+' - '+fmt(Vs,3)+') / '+fmt(A1,3)+' = '+fmt(v2,2)+' m/s';
    el.eq3.textContent='v_f = ('+fmt(D1,2)+'^2 / '+fmt(Df,2)+'^2) · '+fmt(v2,2)+' = '+fmt(vf,2)+' m/s';
    const qmax=Math.max(V1,V2,Vs,.0001); strength(el.main[0],V1,qmax,.35); strength(el.main[1],V1,qmax,.35); strength(el.main[2],V2,qmax,.24); strength(el.main[3],V2,qmax,.24); strength(el.main[4],V2,qmax,.24);
    el.suctions.forEach(function(s){ strength(s,Vs/12,qmax,.18); });
    el.bl.style.opacity=String(Math.max(.18,Math.min(.72,Vs/6.5)));
    root.querySelector('.l0').textContent='v0 = '+fmt(v0,2)+' m/s';
    root.querySelector('.l2').textContent='v2 = '+fmt(v2,2)+' m/s';
    root.querySelector('.lf').textContent='v_f = '+fmt(vf,2)+' m/s';
  }
  Object.values(sliders).forEach(s => s.addEventListener('input', update));
  update();
})();
</script>

```

***

### ZADATAK 75.

**Tekst zadatka:**
75. Pumpa ubrizgava vodu, prikazano na slici, brzinom $v_1 = 26 \text{ m/s}$ kroz cijev promjera 100 mm, oko koje struji voda brzinom 2,6 m/s . Dva toka se nizstrujno miješaju, pri čemu u presjeku 3 brzina $v_3$ postaje konstantnom. Ukoliko je tok stacionaran i nestlačiv, potrebno je odrediti brzinu $v_3$.

**Zadano:**
$$v_1 = 26 \left[\frac{m}{s}\right], \quad v_2 = 2,6 \left[\frac{m}{s}\right], \quad D_1 = 0,1[m], \quad D_2 = 0,3[m], \quad \rho_v = 998 \left[\frac{kg}{m^3}\right]$$

**Odrediti:** brzinu u cijevi na presjeku 3 $v_3 = ?$

**Pretpostavke:** fluid je nestlačiv, tok je stacionaran

**Objašnjenje i rješenje korak po korak:**

1.  **Fizikalni model:** Imamo dva ulazna toka. Prvi je kroz unutarnju cijev ($A_1$), a drugi kroz prstenasti prostor između cijevi 1 i vanjske cijevi 2 ($A_2 - A_1$). Na kraju se spajaju u cijev promjera $D_2$ (presjek 3).
2.  **Jednadžba bilance protoka:**
    $$\dot{V}_1 + \dot{V}_2 = \dot{V}_3$$
    $$A_1 \cdot v_1 + (A_2 - A_1) \cdot v_2 = A_3 \cdot v_3$$
    Budući da je $A_3 = A_2$ (vanjski promjer cijevi u kojoj se miješaju), uvrštavamo formule:
    $$\frac{D_1^2 \pi}{4} \cdot v_1 + \frac{(D_2^2 - D_1^2) \pi}{4} \cdot v_2 = \frac{D_2^2 \pi}{4} \cdot v_3$$
3.  **Izračun brzine $v_3$:**
    Poništavamo $\pi/4$ i izoliramo $v_3$:
    $$v_3 = \frac{D_1^2 \cdot v_1 + (D_2^2 - D_1^2) \cdot v_2}{D_2^2}$$
    $$v_3 = \frac{0,1^2 \cdot 26 + (0,3^2 - 0,1^2) \cdot 2,6}{0,3^2} = \frac{0,26 + 0,08 \cdot 2,6}{0,09} = \frac{0,468}{0,09} = \mathbf{5,2\text{ [m/s]}}$$

```{=html}
<div id="coaxial-widget-75-premium" style="font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:1100px;margin:2rem auto;border:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.14);border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#f8fbff);box-shadow:0 22px 54px rgba(41,76,109,.12);color:#17324d;">
  <style>
    #coaxial-widget-75-premium *{box-sizing:border-box}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .hero{padding:1.3rem 1.5rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(86,204,242,.22),transparent 35%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#fff 52%,#f4fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.12)}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .hero h3{margin:0 0 .35rem;font-size:1.25rem;color:#1e4a73}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .hero p{margin:0;color:#627f97;line-height:1.55;font-size:.95rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:1rem;padding:1rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .card{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(62,101,137,.1);border-radius:18px;box-shadow:0 12px 26px rgba(57,79,102,.08)}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.9rem;align-content:start;order:2}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .controls h4,#coaxial-widget-75-premium .viz h4{margin:0;font-size:.82rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b8296}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.3rem;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#294764}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .row input{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .note{padding:.85rem .95rem;border-radius:14px;background:rgba(47,128,237,.08);border:1px solid rgba(47,128,237,.12);font-size:.88rem;color:#507290;line-height:1.55}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .viz{display:contents;order:1}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .stage{padding:1rem;position:relative;min-height:420px;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f7fbff,#fbfdff);order:1}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .metrics{order:3}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .profile{order:4}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .formula{order:5}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(86,116,143,.07) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(86,116,143,.07) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:28px 28px;opacity:.4}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .zones{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.1fr 1fr;gap:.9rem;align-items:center;position:relative;margin-top:1.1rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .zone{position:relative;height:220px;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.1);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#f5faff);overflow:hidden}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .zone h5{margin:.7rem 0 0;text-align:center;font-size:.82rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6a8298}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .pipe{position:absolute;left:10%;right:10%;top:50%;height:84px;transform:translateY(-50%);border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#eff7ff,#dcebf9);border:3px solid #4a6f90;overflow:hidden}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .core{position:absolute;top:50%;left:10%;right:10%;height:38px;transform:translateY(-50%);border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#2f80ed,#1f5fb6);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,.32) inset;transition:height .35s ease}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .annulus{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(86,204,242,.35),rgba(86,204,242,.18))}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .flow{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:.95;transition:transform .35s ease,opacity .35s ease}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .flow-core{background:radial-gradient(circle at 18% 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.84) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 0 50%/34px 100% repeat-x,linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(47,128,237,.08),rgba(47,128,237,.84),rgba(47,128,237,.08));animation:mf175right 1.1s linear infinite}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .flow-ann{background:radial-gradient(circle at 18% 26%,rgba(255,255,255,.8) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 0 24%/38px 46% repeat-x,radial-gradient(circle at 18% 74%,rgba(255,255,255,.8) 0 2px,transparent 3px) 0 76%/38px 46% repeat-x,linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(86,204,242,.08),rgba(86,204,242,.74),rgba(86,204,242,.08));animation:mf175right 1.45s linear infinite}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .mixbox{position:absolute;left:8%;right:8%;top:18%;bottom:18%;border-radius:22px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%,rgba(47,128,237,.4),transparent 20%),radial-gradient(circle at 68% 62%,rgba(86,204,242,.42),transparent 24%),radial-gradient(circle at 44% 72%,rgba(47,128,237,.26),transparent 20%),linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(47,128,237,.16),rgba(86,204,242,.16));border:2px dashed rgba(74,111,144,.28)}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .eddy{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(74,111,144,.18);animation:mf175spin linear infinite}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .e1{width:44px;height:44px;left:22%;top:28%;animation-duration:6.5s}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .e2{width:58px;height:58px;right:26%;top:40%;animation-duration:7.2s;animation-direction:reverse}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .e3{width:36px;height:36px;left:48%;bottom:24%;animation-duration:5.8s}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .mixstream{position:absolute;left:9%;right:9%;top:50%;height:54px;transform:translateY(-50%);border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(47,128,237,.4),rgba(86,204,242,.72),rgba(58,164,224,.55));box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,.26) inset}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .profile{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.9rem;padding:1rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .profile-card{padding:1rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fafdff,#eef7ff);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.1)}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .profile-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:.5rem;height:120px;margin-top:.8rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .bar{flex:1;border-radius:12px 12px 6px 6px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#9fd8ff,#2f80ed);min-height:18px;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;color:#10395e;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;padding:.35rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .bar.ann{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#c7f1ff,#56ccf2)}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .metrics,#coaxial-widget-75-premium .formula{padding:1rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .metrics h4,#coaxial-widget-75-premium .formula h4{margin:0 0 .9rem;font-size:.98rem;color:#1a4266}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .gridm{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.85rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .metric{padding:.85rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fafdff,#eef7ff);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.1)}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .metric .k{display:block;font-size:.77rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#67829c;margin-bottom:.35rem}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .metric .v{font-size:1.06rem;font-weight:800;color:#10395e;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .metric .s{margin-top:.25rem;font-size:.78rem;color:#64819b}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .box{padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.76);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.12);line-height:1.65;color:#355771}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .eq{font-family:"Cambria Math","STIX Two Math",serif;font-size:1.02rem;color:#143d62}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .small{font-size:.84rem;color:#64819b;margin-top:.55rem}@keyframes mf175right{from{background-position:0 50%,0 0,0 0}to{background-position:34px 50%,34px 24%,34px 76%}}@keyframes mf175spin{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}@media (max-width:980px){#coaxial-widget-75-premium .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr}#coaxial-widget-75-premium .zones,#coaxial-widget-75-premium .gridm,#coaxial-widget-75-premium .profile{grid-template-columns:1fr}}@media (max-width:640px){#coaxial-widget-75-premium .gridm{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  </style>
  <div class="hero">
    <h3>Widget 75: Koaksijalno miješanje dvaju tokova</h3>
    <p>Brži središnji mlaz i sporiji prstenasti tok nizvodno se miješaju u jedinstveni profil brzine. Kontinuitet određuje konačnu uniformnu brzinu <span class="eq">v_3</span> na izlazu.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="card controls">
      <div class="note"><strong>Fizikalni smisao:</strong> Brzi središnji mlaz nosi velik impuls, ali zauzima samo dio presjeka. Nakon miješanja taj se protok raspodijeli na cijeli izlazni presjek pa je konačna brzina <span class="eq">v_3</span> znatno manja od početne brzine mlaza.</div>
      <h4>Ulazni parametri</h4>
      <div class="row"><label for="cx75-v1"><span>Brzina mlaza v1</span><span id="cx75-v1-val">26.0 m/s</span></label><input id="cx75-v1" type="range" min="10" max="40" step="0.5" value="26"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="cx75-v2"><span>Brzina okruženja v2</span><span id="cx75-v2-val">2.6 m/s</span></label><input id="cx75-v2" type="range" min="1" max="10" step="0.1" value="2.6"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="cx75-d1"><span>Promjer unutarnje cijevi D1</span><span id="cx75-d1-val">100 mm</span></label><input id="cx75-d1" type="range" min="50" max="150" step="1" value="100"></div>
      <div class="row"><label for="cx75-d2"><span>Vanjski promjer D2</span><span id="cx75-d2-val">300 mm</span></label><input id="cx75-d2" type="range" min="150" max="400" step="1" value="300"></div>
      <div class="note">Ulazni profil ima dva režima: brzi centar i sporiji prsten. Nizvodno turbulencija izjednačava brzinu, pa izlaz prelazi u gotovo ravni profil s jedinstvenom vrijednošću <span class="eq">v_3</span>.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="viz">
      <div class="card stage">
        <div class="grid"></div>
        <div class="zones">
          <div class="zone">
            <h5>Ulaz</h5>
            <div class="pipe">
              <div class="annulus"></div>
              <div id="cx75-core-in" class="core"></div>
              <div class="flow flow-ann" id="cx75-flow-ann-in"></div>
              <div class="flow flow-core" id="cx75-flow-core-in"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="zone">
            <h5>Zona miješanja</h5>
            <div class="mixbox">
              <div class="eddy e1"></div><div class="eddy e2"></div><div class="eddy e3"></div>
              <div class="mixstream" id="cx75-mixstream"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="zone">
            <h5>Potpuno izmiješano</h5>
            <div class="pipe">
              <div id="cx75-core-out" class="mixstream" style="left:10%;right:10%;height:54px;"></div>
              <div class="flow flow-core" id="cx75-flow-out"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card metrics">
        <h4>Rezultati u stvarnom vremenu</h4>
        <div class="gridm">
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A1</span><span id="cx75-A1" class="v">0.0079 m^2</span><div class="s">Površina mlaza</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A_ann</span><span id="cx75-Aann" class="v">0.0628 m^2</span><div class="s">Prstenasti presjek</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A2</span><span id="cx75-A2" class="v">0.0707 m^2</span><div class="s">Ukupni izlazni presjek</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">v3</span><span id="cx75-v3" class="v">5.20 m/s</span><div class="s">Uniformna brzina izlaza</div></div>
          <div class="metric"><span class="k">A1/A2</span><span id="cx75-ratio" class="v">0.111</span><div class="s">Omjer središnjeg mlaza</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card profile">
        <div class="profile-card">
          <h4>Profil brzine na ulazu</h4>
          <div class="profile-bars">
            <div id="cx75-bar-v2a" class="bar ann">v2</div>
            <div id="cx75-bar-v1" class="bar">v1</div>
            <div id="cx75-bar-v2b" class="bar ann">v2</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="profile-card">
          <h4>Profil brzine na izlazu</h4>
          <div class="profile-bars">
            <div id="cx75-bar-v3a" class="bar">v3</div>
            <div id="cx75-bar-v3b" class="bar">v3</div>
            <div id="cx75-bar-v3c" class="bar">v3</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card formula">
        <h4>Kontinuitet za miješanje</h4>
        <div class="box">
          <div class="eq">v_3 = (A_1 v_1 + A_ann v_2) / A_2, gdje je A_ann = π/4 · (D_2^2 - D_1^2)</div>
          <div id="cx75-eq1" style="margin-top:.55rem">v_3 = (0.0079·26.0 + 0.0628·2.6) / 0.0707 = 5.20 m/s</div>
          <div id="cx75-eq2" style="margin-top:.55rem">V̇_1 + V̇_2 = V̇_3</div>
          <div class="small">Ako središnji mlaz zauzima mali udio presjeka, njegov veliki impuls se razblažuje na velikom izlaznom presjeku, pa je konačna brzina daleko bliže sporijem prstenastom toku nego ulaznom mlazu.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const root = document.getElementById('coaxial-widget-75-premium');
  if (!root) return;
  const sliders = { v1: root.querySelector('#cx75-v1'), v2: root.querySelector('#cx75-v2'), d1: root.querySelector('#cx75-d1'), d2: root.querySelector('#cx75-d2') };
  const labels = { v1: root.querySelector('#cx75-v1-val'), v2: root.querySelector('#cx75-v2-val'), d1: root.querySelector('#cx75-d1-val'), d2: root.querySelector('#cx75-d2-val') };
  const el = {
    coreIn: root.querySelector('#cx75-core-in'), coreOut: root.querySelector('#cx75-core-out'), mixstream: root.querySelector('#cx75-mixstream'),
    flowCoreIn: root.querySelector('#cx75-flow-core-in'), flowAnnIn: root.querySelector('#cx75-flow-ann-in'), flowOut: root.querySelector('#cx75-flow-out'),
    A1: root.querySelector('#cx75-A1'), Aann: root.querySelector('#cx75-Aann'), A2: root.querySelector('#cx75-A2'), v3: root.querySelector('#cx75-v3'), ratio: root.querySelector('#cx75-ratio'),
    eq1: root.querySelector('#cx75-eq1'), eq2: root.querySelector('#cx75-eq2'),
    bars: { v1: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v1'), v2a: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v2a'), v2b: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v2b'), v3a: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v3a'), v3b: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v3b'), v3c: root.querySelector('#cx75-bar-v3c') }
  };
  function fmt(v,d){return Number(v).toFixed(d);}
  function areaMm(mm){const d=mm/1000;return Math.PI*d*d/4;}
  function flowStrength(node,q,maxq,min){const r=maxq>0?q/maxq:0;const s=Math.max(min,Math.min(1,r));node.style.transform='scale('+s+')';node.style.opacity=String(.24+s*.76);node.style.animationDuration=(Math.max(.35,1.7-s*1.1)).toFixed(2)+'s';}
  function barHeight(node,val,maxVal,label){const h=Math.max(18,Math.min(120,120*val/maxVal));node.style.height=h.toFixed(1)+'px';node.textContent=label;}
  function update() {
    let v1=parseFloat(sliders.v1.value),v2=parseFloat(sliders.v2.value),d1=parseFloat(sliders.d1.value),d2=parseFloat(sliders.d2.value);
    if (d2 <= d1) { d2 = d1 + 10; sliders.d2.value = d2; }
    labels.v1.textContent=fmt(v1,1)+' m/s'; labels.v2.textContent=fmt(v2,1)+' m/s'; labels.d1.textContent=fmt(d1,0)+' mm'; labels.d2.textContent=fmt(d2,0)+' mm';
    const A1=areaMm(d1),A2=areaMm(d2),Aann=A2-A1,v3=(A1*v1 + Aann*v2)/A2,Q1=A1*v1,Q2=Aann*v2,Q3=A2*v3;
    el.A1.textContent=fmt(A1,4)+' m^2'; el.Aann.textContent=fmt(Aann,4)+' m^2'; el.A2.textContent=fmt(A2,4)+' m^2'; el.v3.textContent=fmt(v3,2)+' m/s'; el.ratio.textContent=fmt(A1/A2,3);
    el.eq1.textContent='v_3 = ('+fmt(A1,4)+'·'+fmt(v1,1)+' + '+fmt(Aann,4)+'·'+fmt(v2,1)+') / '+fmt(A2,4)+' = '+fmt(v3,2)+' m/s';
    el.eq2.textContent='V̇_1 + V̇_2 = '+fmt(Q1,4)+' + '+fmt(Q2,4)+' = '+fmt(Q3,4)+' m^3/s';
    const innerHeight=Math.max(18,Math.min(62,(d1/d2)*84)); el.coreIn.style.height=innerHeight.toFixed(1)+'px';
    el.mixstream.style.height=(44 + Math.min(20,v3*1.6)).toFixed(1)+'px'; el.coreOut.style.height=(44 + Math.min(20,v3*1.6)).toFixed(1)+'px';
    const qmax=Math.max(Q1,Q2,Q3,.0001); flowStrength(el.flowCoreIn,Q1,qmax,.22); flowStrength(el.flowAnnIn,Q2,qmax,.22); flowStrength(el.flowOut,Q3,qmax,.24);
    const vmax=Math.max(v1,v2,v3,1); barHeight(el.bars.v1,v1,vmax,'v1'); barHeight(el.bars.v2a,v2,vmax,'v2'); barHeight(el.bars.v2b,v2,vmax,'v2'); barHeight(el.bars.v3a,v3,vmax,'v3'); barHeight(el.bars.v3b,v3,vmax,'v3'); barHeight(el.bars.v3c,v3,vmax,'v3');
  }
  Object.values(sliders).forEach(s => s.addEventListener('input', update));
  update();
})();
</script>

```

```{=html}
<style>
  .mf1-ux-intro{display:grid;gap:.85rem;padding:1rem 1.15rem;margin:0 1rem 1rem;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.92),rgba(247,250,252,.92));border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.22);box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.06)}
  .mf1-ux-intro-title{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start}
  .mf1-ux-intro-title strong{font-size:.95rem;color:#16324d}
  .mf1-ux-intro-title span{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#5b7289;background:rgba(255,255,255,.8);padding:.28rem .55rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.18)}
  .mf1-ux-intro p{margin:0;font-size:.89rem;line-height:1.6;color:#526b83}
  .mf1-ux-buttons{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.55rem}
  .mf1-ux-btn{appearance:none;border:none;border-radius:999px;padding:.55rem .9rem;font:inherit;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease,background .18s ease,color .18s ease}
  .mf1-ux-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(15,23,42,.08)}
  .mf1-ux-btn-primary{background:#123a63;color:#fff}
  .mf1-ux-btn-secondary{background:#eef4f9;color:#244767;border:1px solid rgba(36,71,103,.12)}
  .mf1-ux-summary{padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(15,118,110,.08),rgba(14,165,233,.08));border:1px solid rgba(14,116,144,.14);color:#16324d}
  .mf1-ux-summary strong{display:block;margin-bottom:.28rem;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#1f5f76}
  .mf1-ux-summary p{margin:0;font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.55}
  .mf1-ux-range-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-top:.3rem;font-size:.72rem;color:#7a8ea3}
  .mf1-ux-range-meta span{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.25rem}
  @media (max-width:640px){
    .mf1-ux-intro-title{flex-direction:column}
    .mf1-ux-buttons{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .mf1-ux-btn{justify-content:center;text-align:center}
  }
</style>
<script>
(function() {
  function enhanceWidget(config) {
    const root = document.getElementById(config.rootId);
    if (!root || root.dataset.mf1UxReady === '1') return;
    const hero = root.querySelector('.hero') || root.firstElementChild;
    const controls = root.querySelector('.controls');
    if (!hero || !controls) return;
    root.dataset.mf1UxReady = '1';

    const intro = document.createElement('div');
    intro.className = 'mf1-ux-intro';
    intro.innerHTML =
      '<div class="mf1-ux-intro-title"><strong>' + config.title + '</strong><span>Brzi scenariji</span></div>' +
      '<p>' + config.tip + '</p>' +
      '<div class="mf1-ux-buttons"></div>';
    hero.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', intro);

    const buttons = intro.querySelector('.mf1-ux-buttons');
    config.presets.forEach(function(preset) {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.type = 'button';
      btn.className = 'mf1-ux-btn ' + (preset.kind === 'secondary' ? 'mf1-ux-btn-secondary' : 'mf1-ux-btn-primary');
      btn.textContent = preset.label;
      btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        Object.entries(preset.values).forEach(function(entry) {
          const input = root.querySelector('#' + entry[0]);
          if (!input) return;
          input.value = entry[1];
          input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        });
      });
      buttons.appendChild(btn);
    });

    const summary = document.createElement('div');
    summary.className = 'mf1-ux-summary';
    summary.innerHTML = '<strong>Što se sada događa</strong><p>Pomakni neki klizač za sažetak promjene.</p>';
    controls.insertBefore(summary, controls.firstElementChild.nextElementSibling || controls.firstElementChild);

    controls.querySelectorAll('input[type="range"]').forEach(function(input) {
      const row = input.closest('.row') || input.parentElement;
      if (!row || row.querySelector('.mf1-ux-range-meta')) return;
      const meta = document.createElement('div');
      meta.className = 'mf1-ux-range-meta';
      meta.innerHTML = '<span>min ' + input.min + '</span><span>max ' + input.max + '</span>';
      row.appendChild(meta);
    });

    const updateSummary = function() {
      summary.querySelector('p').textContent = config.summary(root);
    };

    controls.querySelectorAll('input[type="range"]').forEach(function(input) {
      input.addEventListener('input', updateSummary);
      input.addEventListener('change', updateSummary);
    });

    updateSummary();
    setTimeout(updateSummary, 150);
  }

  const configs = [
    {
      rootId: 'diffuser-widget-70-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 70',
      tip: 'Kreni od zadanog slučaja, zatim promijeni promjere. Najbrže se uči kad pratiš kako veći izlazni presjek odmah spušta izlaznu brzinu i mijenja omjer površina.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'd1-70p': 120, 'd2-70p': 180, 'v2-70p': 16, 'rho-70p': 998 } },
        { label: 'Širi difuzor', values: { 'd1-70p': 95, 'd2-70p': 230, 'v2-70p': 14, 'rho-70p': 998 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Skoro bez širenja', values: { 'd1-70p': 130, 'd2-70p': 145, 'v2-70p': 20, 'rho-70p': 998 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const d1 = root.querySelector('#d1-70p-label')?.textContent || '';
        const d2 = root.querySelector('#d2-70p-label')?.textContent || '';
        const v1 = root.querySelector('#v1-res-70p')?.textContent || '';
        const q = root.querySelector('#vdot-res-70p')?.textContent || '';
        return 'Za D1 = ' + d1 + ' i D2 = ' + d2 + ', potrebna ulazna brzina je ' + v1 + ', dok je protok ' + q + '. Usporedi D1 i D2: što je difuzor širi, to je razlika brzina izraženija.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'mixing-widget-71-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 71',
      tip: 'Prvo mijenjaj protoke A i B, pa tek onda promjer izlaza. Tako se najjasnije vidi razlika između bilance mase i geometrijskog utjecaja presjeka C.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'qa-71p': 150, 'qb-71p': 30, 'dc-71p': 30, 'rhoa-71p': 1000, 'rhorel-71p': 0.8 } },
        { label: 'Više ulja', values: { 'qa-71p': 120, 'qb-71p': 60, 'dc-71p': 30, 'rhoa-71p': 1000, 'rhorel-71p': 0.87 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Širi izlaz', values: { 'qa-71p': 180, 'qb-71p': 30, 'dc-71p': 42, 'rhoa-71p': 1000, 'rhorel-71p': 0.8 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const vc = root.querySelector('#vc-71p')?.textContent || '';
        const rhoc = root.querySelector('#rhoc-71p')?.textContent || '';
        const mc = root.querySelector('#mc-71p')?.textContent || '';
        return 'Mješavina na izlazu trenutno ima brzinu ' + vc + ', gustoću ' + rhoc + ' i ukupni maseni tok ' + mc + '. Ako povećaš protok ulja, izlaz postaje gušći; ako povećaš D_C, brzina pada.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'tank-widget-72-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 72',
      tip: 'Najprije usporedi ulaznu brzinu v1 s izlazima v2 i v3. To je najintuitivniji put do razumijevanja znaka dh/dt i smjera toka zraka kroz odzračnik.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'tank72-v1': 8.3, 'tank72-v2': 0.9, 'tank72-v3': 3.6, 'tank72-ds': 0.61, 'tank72-d1': 75, 'tank72-d2': 50, 'tank72-d3': 60, 'tank72-d4': 50 } },
        { label: 'Brzo punjenje', values: { 'tank72-v1': 12, 'tank72-v2': 0.6, 'tank72-v3': 2.5, 'tank72-ds': 0.55, 'tank72-d1': 90, 'tank72-d2': 45, 'tank72-d3': 55, 'tank72-d4': 50 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Pražnjenje', values: { 'tank72-v1': 3.0, 'tank72-v2': 2.5, 'tank72-v3': 6.5, 'tank72-ds': 0.50, 'tank72-d1': 60, 'tank72-d2': 70, 'tank72-d3': 90, 'tank72-d4': 50 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const status = root.querySelector('#tank72-status')?.textContent || '';
        const dhdt = root.querySelector('#tank72-dhdt')?.textContent || '';
        const v4 = root.querySelector('#tank72-v4')?.textContent || '';
        return status + '. Razina se mijenja brzinom ' + dhdt + ', a zrak u cijevi 4 ima brzinu ' + v4 + '.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'tank-widget-73-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 73',
      tip: 'Ovdje prvo prati razliku između volumena vode i benzina, a tek onda brzinu zraka. Smjer zraka je posljedica volumenske bilance slojevitog spremnika.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'tank73-m1': 10.2, 'tank73-m2': 5.3, 'tank73-rb': 0.69, 'tank73-rz': 1.2, 'tank73-d3': 50 } },
        { label: 'Istisak zraka', values: { 'tank73-m1': 14, 'tank73-m2': 4, 'tank73-rb': 0.67, 'tank73-rz': 1.2, 'tank73-d3': 50 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Usis zraka', values: { 'tank73-m1': 6, 'tank73-m2': 8, 'tank73-rb': 0.75, 'tank73-rz': 1.2, 'tank73-d3': 50 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const status = root.querySelector('#tank73-status')?.textContent || '';
        const v3 = root.querySelector('#tank73-v3air')?.textContent || '';
        const rhoB = root.querySelector('#tank73-rho-b')?.textContent || '';
        return status + '. Zrak u cijevi 3 trenutno ima brzinu ' + v3 + ', a gustoća benzina je ' + rhoB + '.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'wind-tunnel-74-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 74',
      tip: 'Najbolje je odvojeno testirati jačinu pojedine perforacije i ukupan broj provrta. Tako se brzo vidi kako lokalni odsis određuje globalni pad protoka u glavnom kanalu.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'wt74-v1': 46, 'wt74-vp': 10, 'wt74-np': 800, 'wt74-dp': 7, 'wt74-l': 4, 'wt74-d1': 0.9, 'wt74-df': 2.4 } },
        { label: 'Jak odsis', values: { 'wt74-v1': 46, 'wt74-vp': 16, 'wt74-np': 1000, 'wt74-dp': 9, 'wt74-l': 5, 'wt74-d1': 0.9, 'wt74-df': 2.4 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Slab odsis', values: { 'wt74-v1': 46, 'wt74-vp': 6, 'wt74-np': 500, 'wt74-dp': 5, 'wt74-l': 3, 'wt74-d1': 0.9, 'wt74-df': 2.4 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const vs = root.querySelector('#wt74-Vs')?.textContent || '';
        const v2 = root.querySelector('#wt74-v2')?.textContent || '';
        const vf = root.querySelector('#wt74-vf')?.textContent || '';
        return 'Ukupni odsis je ' + vs + ', pa brzina u presjeku 2 pada na ' + v2 + ', a potrebna brzina ventilatora postaje ' + vf + '.';
      }
    },
    {
      rootId: 'coaxial-widget-75-premium',
      title: 'Kako koristiti widget 75',
      tip: 'Najlakše je pratiti omjer D1/D2 i razliku v1 prema v2. Tada odmah postaje jasno zašto konačna brzina v3 obično nije blizu brzom središnjem mlazu nego ukupnoj bilanci presjeka.',
      presets: [
        { label: 'Početni primjer', values: { 'cx75-v1': 26, 'cx75-v2': 2.6, 'cx75-d1': 100, 'cx75-d2': 300 } },
        { label: 'Dominantan mlaz', values: { 'cx75-v1': 34, 'cx75-v2': 2.0, 'cx75-d1': 120, 'cx75-d2': 260 }, kind: 'secondary' },
        { label: 'Široki prsten', values: { 'cx75-v1': 22, 'cx75-v2': 4.0, 'cx75-d1': 80, 'cx75-d2': 360 }, kind: 'secondary' }
      ],
      summary: function(root) {
        const v3 = root.querySelector('#cx75-v3')?.textContent || '';
        const ratio = root.querySelector('#cx75-ratio')?.textContent || '';
        return 'Nakon miješanja izlazna uniformna brzina je ' + v3 + ', dok središnji mlaz zauzima omjer A1/A2 = ' + ratio + '. Taj omjer snažno određuje koliko će brzi mlaz “povući” cijeli izlaz.';
      }
    }
  ];

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { configs.forEach(enhanceWidget); });
  } else {
    configs.forEach(enhanceWidget);
  }
})();
</script>
```
